title: Cubic
description: Fast Vanilla+, adventure and tech modpack.
body:
# Cubic
### Description
**Cubic modpack** is a fast adventure and tech modpack that aims to create a Vanilla+ experience usind NeoForge and a few key mods, with lots of optimization mods, so low-end PCs can play it just like unmodded Vanilla Minecraft.
### Mods
Cubic includes four types of mods:
- **Tech mods** add new mechanics and items to the game. Some of the remarkable tech mods found in Cubic are Create and Security Craft
- **Adventure mods** add new structures and items that help with exploration. Dungeons and Taverns and Traveler's Backpack are some are some adventure mods included.
- **Optimization mode** improve performance without removing content from the game. Sodium and Distant Horizons are some optimization mods inclouded.
- **Quality Of Life mods** improve the player's experience when using the already existing mechanics of the game.
### Compatibility
The modpack is made to run on low end PCs and improve the framerate on high end PCs. The minimum amount of RAM recomended is **4GB**, but you can play on **2GB** of RAM if you lower settings. On the CPU side, you can play the modpack with any CPU that can play Vanilla. For high end users, Complementary Shaders (Reimagined) are included, but you can download your own.
### Multiplayer
You can create a server by using the modpack's mods or play using LAN worlds. There are multyplayer mods included such as Security Craft.
### Remarks
**Tectonic** is custom configured for wider and lower mountain ranges, you can change the config by accesing _tectonic.json_ in the config folder
